# Reports

Generate filtered views of active projects for planning meetings and status updates.

[← Back to features](README.md)

## Filters

- Project status
- Project leader
- Due date range
- Volunteer requirement
- Overdue projects only
- Financial status (Committee members and admins only)

## Export and delivery

- Export a **Projects status** report as PDF
- Email the report to a chosen address

Reports reflect the current filter set and are useful for regular committee reviews.

## Permissions

Financial columns are visible to users with the **Committee** tag or the **admin** role. See [Roles and permissions](roles-and-permissions.md).
